name: Fruit Cake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs and beat well after mixing.
3. Stir in the dissolved baking soda.
4. Sift together flour, ground cloves, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
5. Mix fruit into the dry ingredients.
6. Gradually blend in apple juice until combined.
7. Fold in chopped pecans gently.
8. Shape dough into teaspoonfuls on a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 300°F for 20 minutes.
